message:
test: add required-features to Cargo.toml [[test]] entries and feature gates to remaining test files

Adds [[test]] sections in Cargo.toml with required-features for 13
feature-gated test files, ensuring cargo skips them when features are
disabled rather than failing at compile time. Also adds #![cfg(feature)]
guards to 5 additional test files that were missing them:

- proptest_tantivy_reindex.rs: recorder-lexical
- recorder_recovery_drills.rs: recorder-lexical
- recorder_tantivy_integration.rs: recorder-lexical
- tantivy_integration_tests.rs: recorder-lexical
- tantivy_search_integration.rs: recorder-lexical

Also adds required-features = ["recorder-lexical"] to the
tantivy_search benchmark entry.

This completes the feature-gating of all integration tests that depend
on optional crate features, fixing default `cargo test` without
`--all-features`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -269,6 +269,7 @@ required-features = ["streaming"]
 [[bench]]
 name = "tantivy_search"
 harness = false
+required-features = ["recorder-lexical"]
 
 [[bench]]
 name = "semantic_compression"
@@ -295,6 +296,71 @@ harness = false
 name = "wal_throughput"
 harness = false
 
+[[test]]
+name = "proptest_daemon"
+path = "tests/proptest_daemon.rs"
+required-features = ["semantic-search"]
+
+[[test]]
+name = "proptest_recorder_lexical_ingest"
+path = "tests/proptest_recorder_lexical_ingest.rs"
+required-features = ["recorder-lexical"]
+
+[[test]]
+name = "proptest_recorder_lexical_schema"
+path = "tests/proptest_recorder_lexical_schema.rs"
+required-features = ["recorder-lexical"]

+[[test]]
+name = "proptest_search"
+path = "tests/proptest_search.rs"
+required-features = ["recorder-lexical"]
+
+[[test]]

+path = "tests/proptest_tantivy_ingest.rs"
+required-features = ["recorder-lexical"]
+
+[[test]]
+name = "proptest_tantivy_policy"
+path = "tests/proptest_tantivy_policy.rs"
+required-features = ["recorder-lexical"]
+
+[[test]]
+name = "proptest_tantivy_quality"
+path = "tests/proptest_tantivy_quality.rs"
+required-features = ["recorder-lexical"]
+
+[[test]]
+name = "proptest_tantivy_query"
+path = "tests/proptest_tantivy_query.rs"
+required-features = ["recorder-lexical"]
+
+[[test]]
+name = "proptest_tantivy_reindex"
+path = "tests/proptest_tantivy_reindex.rs"
+required-features = ["recorder-lexical"]
+
+[[test]]
+name = "recorder_recovery_drills"
+path = "tests/recorder_recovery_drills.rs"

+
+[[test]]
+name = "recorder_tantivy_integration"
+path = "tests/recorder_tantivy_integration.rs"

+
+[[test]]
+name = "tantivy_integration_tests"
+path = "tests/tantivy_integration_tests.rs"
+required-features = ["recorder-lexical"]
+
+[[test]]
+name = "tantivy_search_integration"
+path = "tests/tantivy_search_integration.rs"
+required-features = ["recorder-lexical"]
+
 [features]
 # Default-on so workspace builds include FrankenSearch + agent-detection integration.
 # Use `--no-default-features` to compile without these dependencies.
